handoff.planSummary: Insert four action functions (increment, decrement, reset, addHistory) and five event listeners (3 button clicks + 1 document keydown) into the existing app.js scaffold between the DOM refs and render sections, strictly following HOW.md patterns. Create tests/e2e/counter.spec.ts with 6 focused E2E scenarios. No changes needed to index.html or style.css.

scope.rationale: All changes are localized to a single existing file (app.js) with clearly prescribed patterns from HOW.md. The only new file is a test file. No architecture changes, no new modules, no HTML/CSS modifications required.
